name: @hasna/banking
description: Agent-safe banking control plane for Hasna infrastructure and AI agents.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm && bun build src/cli/index.ts --outfile dist/cli/index.js --target bun --format esm && bun build src/mcp/index.ts --outfile dist/mcp/index.js --target bun --format esm && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
scripts.smoke:cli: bun run src/cli/index.ts --help && bun run src/cli/index.ts providers list --json
scripts.verify:release: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run build && bun run smoke:dist && bun run pack:check
